title: Core default theme and resolver cleanup
gates: cargo nextest run -p merman-render block_svg class_svg flowchart_svg
checkpoints: Stop after TPR-020 if default theme expansion changes broad SVG goldens unexpectedly.
Stop before deleting renderer fallbacks unless tests prove the core resolver owns the defaults.
side_effect_policy: Stage only files touched for the current bounded task. Do not rewrite unrelated renderer output.

title: Theme surface and fixture hardening
checkpoints: Stop if themeCSS support requires a new security ADR.
Stop if exposing base in playground creates compare-mode mismatch.
side_effect_policy: Keep API and UI changes backward compatible for existing shared URLs.
